identity_contract.split_merge_policy: Preserve all official candidates and scores; accept only policy-qualified unique physical bindings and quarantine split/merge ambiguity.

requirements: register every selected DR4 table as a new release-scoped source
pin licenses, citations, schemas, retrieval contracts, field dispositions, units, epochs, frames, nulls, limits, and completeness gates
compare the published DR4 schema to DR3 without copying DR3 assumptions
derive a DR4 uncertainty-aware envelope independently from the DR3 target universe
preserve byte-identical TAP responses, exact ADQL, UWS jobs, checksums, counts, and retrieval timestamps
index bulk observation products but cache them on demand
cook each DR4 table independently into deterministic typed Parquet
preserve parameter sets, methods, models, epochs, frames, uncertainties, bounds, limits, quality flags, and source record identity
pass raw-to-typed clean reproduction and exhaustive field accounting
acquire and preserve the official DR3-to-DR4 neighborhood or crossmatch in both useful directions
materialize release-scoped nodes and provenance-bearing transition edges
account every attempted binding and quarantine one-to-many, many-to-one, component-scope, and high-proper-motion ambiguity
add DR4 E4 adapters without deleting DR3 evidence
version per-quantity authority and applicability policies
preserve coherent DR3 and DR4 alternatives and make every selected delta cite its exact evidence
build DR3-reference and DR4-candidate products from permanent Spacegate identities
explain inventory, identity, hierarchy, parameter, classification, planet-host, map, simulation, API, storage, and performance deltas
promote only after clean reproduction, operator review, atomic local cutover, and tested rollback

forbidden_shortcuts: compare DR3 and DR4 source IDs as interchangeable integers
overwrite DR3 evidence or aliases in place
derive permanent Spacegate object identity from a Gaia release ID
reuse a DR3 table schema or quality rule without a DR4 schema-drift review
promote relation or crossmatch candidates into containment
select field-wise values that break a coherent source parameter set
retire DR3 rollback inputs before the DR4 rollback window closes
